hero.note: Savoury bakes, party bites and sweet things
hero.title: Golden, flaky, gone fast.
hero.description: Proper pies, sausage rolls, Scotch eggs and party boxes—baked in Birmingham and delivered across the Midlands.
hero.imageAlt: Large spread of golden pies, sausage rolls, Scotch eggs and sweet pastries

products.title: The counter favourites
products.description: Reliable classics, generous fillings and pastry with the right kind of mess.

feature.title: A spread that arrives ready.
feature.description: Mixed office lunches, birthday tables and match-day boxes are packed by type, labelled clearly and timed around your event.
feature.imageAlt: Open kraft boxes filled with pies, sausage rolls and Scotch eggs

packages.title: Boxes built for the occasion
packages.description: Straightforward quantities and easy add-ons for homes, teams and full party tables.

items.name: Party table

items.name: Big match box
items.description: Handheld favourites made for sharing around the screen.

gallery.description: The morning bake, the packed box and the first pastry to disappear.

story.title: Familiar bakes, made properly.
story.description: We started at a Birmingham market stall with one pie, one roll and a queue. Today the range is wider, but the pastry is still folded, filled and baked by our own team.
story.imageAlt: Fresh pastries arranged in delivery boxes on a white bakery table
story.quote: Good pastry should shatter a little and leave everyone reaching for another.

process.title: From oven to doorstep
process.description: Fresh baking and organised delivery make larger orders feel simple.

steps.title: Pick a box
steps.description: Choose a ready-made mix or request your own quantities.

steps.title: Tell us when
steps.description: Select collection or a timed Midlands delivery window.

steps.title: We bake
steps.description: Pastry is filled, finished and baked for your order.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Clear labels and easy reheating notes are included.

testimonials.title: Passed around, talked about
testimonials.description: From office kitchens to family parties across the Midlands.

items.quote: The party box looked generous, arrived perfectly organised and vanished in minutes.
items.name: Tosin A.

items.quote: Finally, a sausage roll with real filling and genuinely flaky pastry.
items.name: Ben H.

items.quote: Allergens were labelled clearly and the office delivery was right on time.
items.name: Rachel P.

visit.title: Make the table easy.
visit.description: Collection slots open seven days ahead. Catering quantities and regular workplace orders are welcome.

footer.note: Fresh pastry and party boxes, baked in Birmingham.
